metadata.description: Standards bypass configuration for this branch

bypass.reason: Multi-command module where inbox, sent, contacts work without args by design. Adding no-args gate would break primary mail workflow (drone @ai_mail inbox).
This IS the json_handler implementation — cannot import itself.
handle_command() depth 4 — entry point router, nested subcommand dispatch is inherent to the pattern
3 functions: check_inbox_for_dispatch() depth 4 (priority scanning with business logic), run_daemon() depth 4 (main daemon loop), _check_lock() depth 4 (lock validation + PID liveness + cleanup)
2 functions: _check_lock() depth 4 (lock validation with PID checks and age), _is_branch_occupied() depth 5 (process inspection, filters by session type — must check /proc)
collect_interactive_input() depth 4 — multiple input() calls each need independent try/except for EOF and KeyboardInterrupt
load_inbox() depth 4 — auto-migration between old and new inbox formats requires nested schema checks

2 functions: get_all_branches() depth 6 (registry parsing with format detection, email derivation, collision handling), deliver_email_to_branch() depth 4 (delivery orchestration with lock acquisition)
mark_read_and_archive() depth 4 — lock context manager + inbox loading + message search + archive
inbox_lock() depth 6 — cross-platform file locking context manager (POSIX fcntl vs Windows msvcrt), platform branching is inherent
2 functions: get_user_by_email() depth 4, get_all_users() depth 4 — registry lookup with path normalization and validation
Imports prax.apps.modules.dashboard.write_section — cross-branch module import required for dashboard integration. No ai_mail module wraps this.

Imports json_utils.json_handler (load_json, save_json) — shared handler utility for JSON I/O, same-branch cross-handler import. Also imports registry.read.get_all_branches — consolidated from dual implementation per DPLAN-0036.
Imports central_writer.update_central — same-branch cross-handler import for registry status updates on inbox changes.
Imports users.branch_detection.get_branch_info_from_registry and registry.read.get_all_branches — same-branch cross-handler imports for sender identity and branch listing on reply.
Imports trigger.apps.modules.core.trigger — cross-branch module import for firing email_sent events. trigger integration is by design.
Imports notify.send_notification — same-branch cross-handler import for desktop notifications on dispatch events.
Imports notify.send_notification — same-branch cross-handler import for bounce/completion notifications.
Imports notify.send_notification — same-branch cross-handler import for wake completion notifications.
dispatch_monitor.py in dispatch/ dir — renaming to monitor.py would break all 3 callers (wake.py, daemon.py, MONITOR_SCRIPT references) and confuse with prax monitor.
False positive — results, closed_count, failed_count are local variables, not module-level constants.
False positive — _append_footer is a function reference stored in a local variable, not a module-level constant.
False positive — _write_section is a lazy-import function reference, not a module-level constant.
False positive — path_to_email, to_branch, matched are local variables, not module-level constants.
False positive — _inbox_lock is a lazy-import function reference, not a module-level constant.
False positive — _inbox_lock is a lazy-import function reference, not a module-level constant.
False positive — target_branch, mailbox_path are local variables, not module-level constants.
False positive — error_msg, reply_email_data, target_branch are local variables, not module-level constants.
False positive — claude_cmd, monitor_cmd, stdout are local variables in spawn_agent(), not module-level constants.
batch_close() has a full docstring — seedgo AST detection mismatch on multiline function signature.
deliver_email_to_branch() has a full docstring — seedgo AST detection mismatch on multiline function signature.
dispatch_send_error() has a full docstring — seedgo AST detection mismatch on multiline function signature.
resolve_inbox_target() has a full docstring — seedgo AST detection mismatch on multiline function signature.
send_reply() has a full docstring — seedgo AST detection mismatch on multiline function signature.
resolve_sender_info() has a full docstring — seedgo AST detection mismatch on multiline function signature.
resolve_dispatch_target() has a full docstring — seedgo AST detection mismatch on multiline function signature.
spawn_agent() has a full docstring — seedgo AST detection mismatch on multiline function signature.
_send_direct() depth 5 (arg parsing with branch resolution, --from flag, --dispatch flag), handle_close() depth 4 (close with archive + dashboard update)
_human_readable_age() depth 5, _calculate_section_data() depth 5 — timestamp parsing with multiple fallback formats
_send_bounce() depth 4, main() depth 5 — subprocess management with error handling and log rotation
calculate_age() depth 4 — timestamp parsing with multiple fallback formats
Imports paths.find_repo_root — shared utility consolidated from 8 copies per DPLAN-0036.

example.reason: Circular dependency - logger cannot import CLI

fields.standard: Standard name: cli, imports, naming, etc. (required)
fields.lines: Optional - specific line numbers to bypass
